title: Department Manager Vacancy at Amazon Books India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Amazon Books India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Amazon Books India Holdings Services in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Amazon Books India Holdings Services:
Amazon Books India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Books India Holdings Services!
